nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 新幾內亞島
nodes.summary: 新幾內亞島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联312种鸟类，包括南方鶴鴕、鵲鵝、细斑树鸭等312种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Golden myna
nodes.summary: The golden myna (Mino anais) is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae. It is found in New Guinea. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest. Lesson named this bird after his daughter Anaïs who died when she was eleven years old. References
nodes.shortSummary: The golden myna (Mino anais) is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae. It is found in New Guinea.
